intro: Kneiffia perennis, also known as Peruvian rose or Kneiffia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can be useful in treating various ailments, including wounds, fever, and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Kneiffia perennis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Kneiffia perennis is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
